message:
feat: add outlier analyzer and hybrid quantizer for v2.0

Sprint 1 & 2 of the 30 TPS optimization plan:

- Add outlier_analyzer.zig: detects top 1% magnitude weights in MoE experts
  - Histogram-based 99th percentile detection
  - Binary profile format with tensor-level statistics
  - Validated on Mixtral: 457M outliers (1.01%) from 45B weights

- Add hybrid_quantizer.zig: converts outlier profile to CSR format
  - Compressed Sparse Row format for efficient sparse matmul
  - 1.7 GB CSR vs 2.6 GB raw profile (35% smaller)
  - Prepares for Q2_K base + FP16 outlier hybrid inference

- Update build.zig: add outlier-analyzer and hybrid-quantizer targets

- Disable verbose Q4_K debug output in gguf_loader.zig

Size estimates for Mixtral 8x7B:
- Original Q4_K: 25.37 GB (SSD streaming @ 3 GB/s)
- Hybrid Q2_K + outliers: 16.65 GB (RAM @ 200 GB/s)
- Expected speedup: 10-30x (target 30 TPS from 3 TPS)
